description: Laminated wipe-clean pages allow children to enjoy the activities time and time again! Most good quality felt-tip pens and crayons can be used in these books. Simply wipe clean with a cloth or tissue or with a soft damp cloth. There's a testing space at the back of each book to check each pen or crayons.Please note - Colours and designs may vary, only one supplied.
